transcript.text:
(A hidden must-visit restaurant...???) You can't find this place on the map
(Somewhere in a sus alley..)
(Inside this must-visit place..)
(Hello) (Here are the owners...!!)
(Made by the two ramen enthusiasts..)
(You can't eat this ramen without waiting in line)
(From fake Tzuyang..?) We were worried that we got a fake call..
I still can't believe it now!
(These two enthusiasts are quite doubtful..)
(You think I'm not the real one?)
(I'll prove it to you right away)
(She really is Tzuyang..)
(Get ready for all-time legend ramen) This is great
(made from cute owners)
(The jolliest mukbang is about to begin!)
(Somewhere in a quiet alley..)

Hello everyone
I'm here at
Passion Island in Yongsan
(Today's mukbang) And I'm here for ramen today!
And I heard this place
(It's hidden..?) is known to certain food enthusiasts
It's said native Japanese people actually visit here a lot
(Where's the entrance..?) So I was super curious about it
There's no sign here...
So I kept looking for it when I got here
And that's the sign right there!
(Very, very small..) See that little sign?
We have to walk inside here!
(Somewhere in between the buildings of the Passion Island)
(Don't miss this alley!)
And I heard this is another branch of a must-visit ramen place in Tenjin

(Arrived) This is so cool
(Once you get inside the alley)
(A small-sized but cozy Japanese restaurant will greet you..!)
You won't be able
to get here unless you look it up online
('Hanamokoshi', Located in Yongsan-gu) This place is called 'Hanamokoshi'
And I'll be the first YouTuber
to film this place!!
They don't allow videos usually
(Much thanks..!) But they gave me permission
(Entered the store) Hello
(The owner of 'Hanamokoshi'!) He's the owner
I'm Japanese
(Speaking Korean) I don't speak Korean
(You can't be serious-desu..) But you're fluent!
(Trilingual) She's so slim

(So slim = Means she's so fit)
There's always a waiting line here
But they allowed me to film during the break time
(Thank you for being so considerate!) So it's just me now
(Found the menus!)
Just two menus!
(Simple menus of 'Hanamokoshi') Torisoba! Sounds delicious...and mazemen
So it's only two menus, right?
(Torisoba, mazemen) That's the two main dish
We have tsukemen as well
There are other menus?
(Tsukemen will soon be on the menu!) We're going to renew our menu
So it's 3 main dishes?
Torisoba, mazemen, and tsukemen
I'll have 2 each!!
(6 bowls of noodles...) Okay

(Speaking Japanese) Will she be okay..?
(It's totally fine..)
(Speaking Japanese) That's just amazing lol
What's this soboro gohan?
(It's a Japanese-style rice bowl with chicken and kelp!)
(+ Soboro gohan) I'll have this one as well
(Done ordering) Thank you
(If you seek ramen on another level..)
(The one that's truly authentic..)
(You must remember 'Hanamokoshi')
(Tsukemen)
(Mazemen)
(Torisoba)
That looks amazing! Thank you!
This is mazemen
- (Whaaa?!) - Please mix mazemen right away

Tsukemen
Whoa! Thank you!
(Whaaa...)
And this is a side dish, cucumbers!
(No cucumbers) I'll pass
LOLOL
(Speaking Korean) No cucumber, eh?
(Embarrassed)
(They're all here) Looks delicious!
(Finds her purely amazing..)
Bon Appetite!
Please, enjoy!
(Torisoba / Torisoba) This is torisoba
And I can already tell the broth is really thick
Whoa, so rich in flavors!!
It's full of pleasant scents,

and rich in flavors
And I thought it'd be salty since it's authentic Japanese ramen
But the seasoning is perfect!
This is the most legit chicken broth I've ever tasted!
This ramen is really on point!!
And now to sous vide chicken breast
But chicken breast...??
That can't be chicken breast!
It just melts in your mouth, it's that soft
We have one more coming up..
(Soboro gohan!) Thank you
We've never had a single customer order so much..
(The single customer) And this is one serving?
(Of course) Yeah
Awesome
(Generous amount) It's a rice bowl called 'soboro gohan'

(Whaaa..??)
The noodles are rather thin, so they're seasoned well
(How should I say this..) I don't think chewy is the right word...
It's quite sticky!
This is so good
Just awesome..!
(Everything happens for a reason..) No wonder people wait in lines
I've tried many rich tonkotsu broth before
But I've never tried chicken broth this rich
The noodles are great!
(Out of this world) This can't be real
(A bite of soft-boiled egg..!)
(Genuine reaction...)
Even the egg is good
It's so bouncy on the outside
But the yolk has this

almost creamy but..
chewy texture..
It is cooked just until..!!
it is not runny
This is so savory
This is so good!
And he keeps saying you're good-looking..
(Speaking Japanese) You're so pretty
(So straightforward...)
This is so good, sir
(Speaking Japanese) My
(Speaking English & Korean) highschool friend
is the owner of 'Hanamokoshi' in Japan!
Do people wait in line there too?
The line is really long!
(Even the head store got many people coming in every day..!)

(Now to mazemen!) It looks quite unique to me...like spaghetti?
This kinda looks like spaghetti...
Whoa, what's this???
(Mazemen with special Layu sauce!) It's red under here, didn't see that coming
(Can't wait to try) I'm so excited, how will it taste?
(Amazed) I'll get the meat as well
How is it?
(Thumbs up..!!) It's delicious!
It's savory..
and spicy..
has this tang..
And it's pungent
It tastes like Japanese with a hint of Chinese food
(You are now watching Tzuyang do her magic..)
Mmm, that was great
This one has more seasoning

But it's always better with this type of dish
(Running)
And now to tsukemen!
This one's not on the menu yet
(Still not on the menu!) Oh, it's not on the menu?
- Nope - Really?
So I'm the first one to try it?
(Speaking Korean) The very first one
So you dip it into the sauce and eat it right away!
Isn't this the broth of torisoba?
(Correcto!)
The noodles are different as well, from torisoba
It's slightly thicker
Much more bouncy and chewy
He made the noodles himself last night
- and you can't get anything similar in Korea! - Really?

I guarantee that you won't find anything like it
(The creator of all menus..!!)
This will get a huge response!
(Another moment of Tzuyang's magic..)
(I'll have to pass on this sauce..!) You can't drink this broth though
The broth is so thick that
(How thick is it..?) it's got layers like this
I should just get all this in
Or maybe half to make it not saltier!
The noodles...hmm..
I think it's got some buckwheat in it..
I know what's in there
(The producer shot a film of ramen in Japan..)
Isn't it burdock broth?
We don't use burdock here
(I'll get it right next time..) Better luck next time

If it's
this soft inside
(Well cooked on the outside, moist on the inside..!) You can't really cook the whites like this
(Trying again..?) I know the secret
Simmering it at a low temperature!
Ah...I'm really sorry
That's not it? Hahaha
(Double tap) You can't really sous vide an egg
- You should stop guessing...heh - I'm really sorry
- You got everything wrong - (Enough with the fact bomb..)
(Enjoying the scene)
(Speaking Japanese) Are you okay?
Still got more to go! Hehe
(Speaking Korean & Japanese) Your blood sugar level..
(The owner is such a caring person LOLOL)
(Speaking Korean) Do you have that...?

(Speaking English) Feeling
(Speaking Korean) Full?
(Shaking her head...???)
(Speaking Korean) No?!!
I do feel full
but it all comes down quickly
(Speaking Japanese) That's just amazing...
(Speaking English) Alien
(Even the Alien is no match for her...heh)
(Let's mix the mazemen!) Let's mix it up
This is really my type, I love it
It's so delicious
(Whaaa...)
(Cleared mazemen!)
(Soboro gohan)
This is really savory

I think it's the kelp
that brings up the savoriness
of this dish
Even the rice is cooked properly!
(Last bowl, torisoba!) Last one! I'll bring it over here
A bit of soup first!
This was it..!
It's so good
LOLOL
(Huh?!)
You really were cute back there..heh
(For what..?) I'm sorry
(You should try this) You should get a sip, just one scoop
Looks just like chicken soup to me
A chicken soup?!?!?!
(You better take it back!) It's totally different!

- Whoaaaaa - Good, isn't it?
(Glad you tried..)
And I heard you're the noodle master..
(Speaking English & Korean) Such a professional
(LV. 99 Tzuyang)
(But sir...)
(You really look like Choi Moo-sung, the actor..heh)
(And he's making something else..?)
This one's on the house
Whoa, what's this?
This menu is called 'kaedama'
(For extra noodles!) Oh! It's this one that says extra noodles!
It's got a special sauce as well
So it's different?
(You can either have it or mix it into torisoba!)
We gave half the portion in case you're full

(Of course, they're worried...LOLOL) Thank you, so this is half?
But it's only 3,000 won (2 USD)..
It's super affordable..!!
(And that's half of it..?) If this is 3,000 won...
(You can't order just this menu though) It's just another bowl of ramen
The price is really great!
This noodle has a different taste to it
So if you want
another bowl of something, this will be perfect
Nice
(Torisoba)
Once you add this kaedama,
you can taste this truffle scent in here
(Cleared soboro gohan!)
- (Tzuyang san..) - (Subaramazing..)
(And a final bite of the egg!!)

('Hanamokoshi' ALL CLEAR!)
Wow! That was great!!
I really really enjoyed today's meal!
(That was just awesome..!)
(Let's clear up the bowls!)
(They just keep coming...)
(Done piling them up)
(Still amazed...)
And
that was a great meal!
Please take a picture with us
- Of course! - Thank you
3, 2, 1!
